title: reel:generate-keyframes args
description: Generate one keyframe image per shot of a scene (writes shot.keyframeMediaRef; the key shot also syncs scene.media). Requires the scene to be storyboarded first (reel:generate-storyboard). The workbench consumes the queue and runs the same per-shot pipeline the author uses manually; it must be open. Idempotent: shots that already have a keyframe are skipped unless force=true.

sceneId.description: REQUIRED. The scene (key in scenario.scenes) whose shots get keyframes.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. Defaults to the workbench's active scenario.

force.description: Regenerate keyframes even for shots that already have one. Set force=true whenever the user asks to '重新生成 / 重做 / redo / regenerate' keyframes — otherwise already-generated shots are skipped. Old keyframes are not deleted (archived to the asset library, retrievable). Default false (skip already-generated shots).
